summary: The IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel facility over 200 meters long and deeper than 25 meters in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israeli territory. Defense Minister Israel Katz stated Israel is preparing for an independent military operation against Iran, which could resume at any moment, while the US and Iran agreed to halt attacks and plan talks in Doha. An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion during operations in southern Lebanon, and Western intelligence sources report the Houthis are conducting missile tests to improve range and accuracy.
key_points: IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel over 200 meters long and deeper than 25 meters in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israel. (Source: @idf_telegram/24466)

Defense Minister Katz instructed the IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, stating war could resume at any moment and Israel can act independently without US assistance. (Source: @yediotnews25/132062)
The US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other and plan to meet Tuesday in Doha to resolve the dispute over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @shin_persian/7289)

An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion during Commando Brigade operations in the village of Arnoun in southern Lebanon; the cause remains under investigation. (Source: @manniefabian/58708)

Western intelligence sources report the Houthis are exploiting the current period to upgrade their missile capabilities through launch tests aimed at extending range and improving accuracy. (Source: @pkpoi/143032)
Qatar issued an advisory recommending all ships and maritime activity avoid its waters until further notice. (Source: @yediotnews25/132060)

IDF and Shin Bet killed Zaher Abu Salem, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad terrorist who participated in the October 7 abduction of Israeli civilians, in a strike in northern Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58705)
Israeli troops stationed in southern Syria came under fire with no injuries; IDF responded with return fire, mortars, and a helicopter strike in an open area. (Source: @manniefabian/58703)

sections.executive_summary: The IDF destroyed a major Hezbollah underground tunnel facility in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, measuring over 200 meters long and deeper than 25 meters, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts directed at Israeli territory. Defense Minister Katz announced Israel is preparing for an independent military operation against Iran that could begin imminently, while simultaneously the US and Iran agreed to a cessation of attacks and scheduled Doha talks. An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion during operations in Arnoun, southern Lebanon, underscoring the ongoing threat to Israeli forces in the security zone.

points: Defense Minister Katz stated he instructed the IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, saying it could happen as early as tomorrow, and that Israel is prepared to act independently without US assistance. (Source: @yediotnews25/132062)

Katz warned that war with Iran could resume at any moment, either because Trump decides negotiations have ended or because Iran fires on Israel, and noted Iran has not yet decided whether to return to its nuclear program. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373590)
The US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other and plan to meet Tuesday in Doha to resolve their dispute over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @shin_persian/7289)

Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Baghaee stated an Iranian technical delegation will visit Qatar this week to discuss implementation of understandings, while clarifying that US officials' visit to Qatar is unrelated and no negotiation meetings with the US are expected in the coming days. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
A US official clarified to Iran that frozen funds will not be released unless progress is made on the nuclear file. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80327)
Several IRGC checkpoints and patrols were spotted near Mehrabad Airport, west of Tehran, Tehran Province. (Source: @shin_persian/7294)

Defense Minister Katz revealed disagreements between Netanyahu and Trump over linking the Lebanese and Iranian theaters, with Trump insisting on the linkage to push Iran negotiations; Netanyahu opposed but ultimately accepted a modified approach of surgical strikes rather than collapsing buildings in Beirut. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373590)

Katz stated that strikes on Hezbollah targets in Dahiya, combined with population evacuation, would have brought about the practical collapse of Hezbollah, but the organization was spared a severe blow due to the decision to deepen the security zone in southern Lebanon instead. (Source: @inon_yttach/9212)

Approximately 200,000 residents of southern Lebanon within the yellow line will not return to their homes, and infrastructure destruction stands at roughly 100% in western sector villages up to Petah Tikva and roughly 73% in the eastern sector. (Source: @inon_yttach/9212)
A senior IDF source stated Israel is preparing to act independently in Iran without US assistance, and this could happen soon. (Source: @pkpoi/143034)
Trump's special envoys Witkoff and Kushner are scheduled to participate in a meeting in Doha. (Source: @yediotnews25/132056)

IDF and Shin Bet killed Zaher Abu Salem, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad terrorist who invaded Israel during the October 7, 2023 onslaught and abducted civilians, in a strike in northern Gaza on Sunday. (Source: @manniefabian/58705)
The IDF and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail Al-Masri, the military security chief of Hamas's Rafah Brigade, last week. (Source: @inon_yttach/9211)
A large fire broke out in displacement tents in the Muasi area of Khan Younis following recent Israeli bombardment. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373593)

IDF Battalion 53 entered the Gaza Strip after two months of operational activity in the north, replacing units in the southern coastal line of Rafah, where troops continue destroying terrorist infrastructure and eliminating militants. (Source: @idf_telegram/24472)

The IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel facility in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, measuring over 200 meters long and deeper than 25 meters, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts directed at Israeli territory; the tunnel was built using Iranian regime technology and expertise. (Source: @idf_telegram/24466)

An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion during Commando Brigade operations in the village of Arnoun in southern Lebanon around 1:30 p.m.; the cause remains under investigation. (Source: @manniefabian/58708)

The Lebanese Army is expected to deploy in the western villages of Al-Gharbiyah and Froun under the direct supervision of Admiral Brad Cooper, commander of CENTCOM, who is expected to arrive from Israel. (Source: @New_security8200/202144)

Western intelligence sources report Hezbollah built a massive underground base over years with vehicle passage and infrastructure for launching drones at ranges of hundreds of kilometers, which was only recently discovered after a year and a half of intelligence assessments that the compound was empty. (Source: @pkpoi/143038)
The destruction of the tunnel network in Majdal Zoun caused much of the town to collapse within a matter of days. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93310)
Israeli warplanes conducted flights over southern Lebanon with maximum alert warnings issued. (Source: @redlinkleb/29079)

Israeli troops stationed in southern Syria came under fire; no injuries were caused, and in response troops returned fire, launched mortars in the area, and a helicopter carried out a strike in an open area. (Source: @manniefabian/58703)
Qatar issued an exceptional advisory recommending avoidance of all shipping and maritime activity until further notice. (Source: @yediotnews25/132060)
An Iranian technical delegation will visit Qatar this week to discuss implementation of understandings, while US officials' visit to Qatar is described as unrelated. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
The US and Iran agreed to halt attacks and plan to meet Tuesday in Doha to resolve the Strait of Hormuz dispute. (Source: @shin_persian/7289)
Trump's special envoys Witkoff and Kushner are scheduled to participate in a meeting in Doha. (Source: @yediotnews25/132056)

key_developments: IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, over 200 meters long and deeper than 25 meters, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israeli territory, built with Iranian regime technology. (Source: @idf_telegram/24466)

Defense Minister Katz directed IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, stating war could resume imminently and Israel can act independently without US help. (Source: @yediotnews25/132062)
US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other and will meet Tuesday in Doha to resolve the Strait of Hormuz dispute. (Source: @shin_persian/7289)
An IDF reservist was severely wounded by an explosion during Commando Brigade operations in Arnoun, southern Lebanon; cause under investigation. (Source: @manniefabian/58708)
Western intelligence reports Houthis are conducting missile launch tests to extend range and improve accuracy, exploiting the current period to upgrade capabilities. (Source: @pkpoi/143032)
Qatar issued an advisory recommending all ships and maritime activity avoid its waters until further notice. (Source: @yediotnews25/132060)
Israeli troops in southern Syria came under fire; IDF responded with return fire, mortars, and a helicopter strike in an open area with no injuries. (Source: @manniefabian/58703)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational environment remains highly volatile across multiple theaters. In southern Lebanon, the IDF continues to uncover and destroy extensive Hezbollah tunnel infrastructure built with Iranian expertise, but Israeli forces remain vulnerable to explosive devices as demonstrated by the severe wounding of a reservist in Arnoun. The Houthis are actively upgrading their missile capabilities through testing, posing an evolving threat to regional shipping and Israeli targets. The most significant escalation risk remains the Israel-Iran axis, with Katz explicitly stating war could resume at any moment and the IDF preparing for independent operations. The US-Iran Doha talks represent a potential de-escalation pathway, but Iranian officials have downplayed expectations, and the linkage between the Lebanese and Iranian theaters remains a point of friction between Jerusalem and Washington.
sections.regional_response: Qatar has taken the exceptional step of advising all maritime activity to avoid its waters, reflecting heightened Gulf state concern over the US-Iran confrontation and Strait of Hormuz tensions. The Lebanese Army is preparing to deploy in western villages under direct CENTCOM supervision, signaling an attempt to extend state authority in areas where Hezbollah infrastructure has been degraded. Iran is sending a technical delegation to Qatar to discuss implementation of understandings while explicitly separating this from the US diplomatic track. The deployment of CENTCOM commander Admiral Brad Cooper to oversee Lebanese Army operations indicates continued US investment in building Lebanese state security capacity as a counterweight to Hezbollah.
sections.intelligence_notes: A significant intelligence failure is emerging regarding Hezbollah's underground infrastructure, with Western sources acknowledging that a year and a half of assessments incorrectly concluded a major Hezbollah compound was empty, when in fact it concealed a massive underground base with vehicle passage and drone launch infrastructure capable of reaching hundreds of kilometers. This raises serious questions about the reliability of current intelligence on remaining Hezbollah assets. The destruction of the Majdal Zoun tunnel caused much of the town to collapse, suggesting the scale of underground construction may have compromised civilian infrastructure. Meanwhile, IRGC checkpoints near Mehrabad Airport in Tehran may indicate heightened internal security measures. The IDF's extended infantry training program, adding two months and new Jaguar vehicles, signals preparation for sustained border operations across multiple fronts.
